overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk video game showing a Trauma Team medic in green armor and a red helmet departing from their aerial vehicle in a neon-lit urban plaza at night. The character walks past futuristic architecture and digital billboards toward other team members.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban plaza with trauma team landing zone

events.description: structural column temporarily blocks view of the character

agents.ego_description: walking away from the trauma team vehicle toward other team members standing in the distance

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the building entrance

entered.detail: large white and green aerial ambulance with red cross symbols and 'TRAUMA TEAM' text on the side
pink neon light strips embedded in the concrete ground forming pathways
large illuminated advertisement screen on the building facade
dark vertical support pillar in the plaza

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a Trauma Team medic walking away from their parked aerial vehicle in a covered urban plaza illuminated by pink neon floor strips. The character moves toward a distant teammate while passing structural columns, with digital billboards visible on the surrounding modern architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza assembly area with medical equipment

events.description: character slows down and stops near other trauma team members

agents.ego_description: approaching the group of trauma team members and coming to a stop near a medical stretcher

notable_agents.action: standing next to a medical stretcher on the ground

entered.detail: green and white trauma stretcher lying on the ground near the team member
low concrete wall or railing that temporarily occludes the view
tropical palm tree visible in the background suggesting an open plaza edge

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the plaza, the character passes a concrete barrier and approaches a medical stretcher on the ground where another Trauma Team member stands. The vehicle recedes into the background as the character slows to a stop, with a palm tree and additional digital billboards becoming visible in the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban plaza as a medic advances from their transport toward a medical emergency. It begins with the Trauma Team medic walking away from a parked aerial vehicle, moving past structural columns and digital billboards under the glow of pink neon floor strips. As the character progresses deeper into the plaza, the vehicle recedes into the background while the camera passes a concrete barrier. The scene then opens up to reveal a palm tree and further cyberpunk architecture before the medic slows to a stop beside a medical stretcher and a waiting teammate.
